profile.name: twenty-main

intro.desc: Twenty gives technical teams the building blocks for a custom CRM that meets complex business needs and quickly adapts as the business evolves. Twenty is the CRM you build, ship, and version like the rest of your stack.

install_hints: Run Twenty on your own infrastructure with [Docker Compose](https://docs.twenty.com/developers/self-host/capabilities/docker-compose), or co

detalle.name: twenty-main
detalle.desc: Twenty gives technical teams the building blocks for a custom CRM that meets complex business needs and quickly adapts as the business evolves. Twenty is the CRM you build, ship, and version like the rest of your stack.
detalle.stack: javascript/typescript, typescript, javascript, react, docker, postgres
detalle.avoid_if: ya tienes una herramienta equivalente o no encaja con tu stack actual
